description: Create a GitHub Actions release workflow that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have three jobs: build_deb, build-appimage, and build-windows-packages. The build_deb job builds a Debian package on ubuntu-latest, the build-appimage job builds an AppImage package on ubuntu-18.04, and the build-windows-packages job builds Windows packages on windows-2019. Each job should upload the generated files to the release.
